name: Airwallex
blurb: Airwallex is a global financial technology platform that helps businesses manage financial operations without the high fees of traditional banks

name: Jane Street
blurb: Jane Street is a global trading firm and liquidity provider that specializes in technology-driven trading strategies across various asset classes.

name: RecordPoint
blurb: RecordPoint brings calm to the chaotic world of data, letting organizations discover, govern, and control their data for tighter compliance, more efficiency, and less risk.

name: Optiver
blurb: Optiver is a leading global tech-driven proprietary trading firm and market maker, dedicated to improving financial markets through speed, technology, and algorithmic trading.

name: QRT
blurb: Qube Research & Technologies (QRT) is a global, technology-driven, multi-strategy investment manager.

name: Two Dot Social
blurb: Two Dot Social is your go-to cafe for great coffee, good vibes, and delicious eats in a vibrant, welcoming space.
